description_long: This is a mid-century modern wooden sideboard or media console with a rectangular form and four slender, tapered legs. The front features three open compartments and a section with a woven rattan or cane panel, providing both open shelving and a partially concealed storage area. The back is fully covered with a matching woven panel, giving it a decorative and finished appearance from all sides. The top surface is flat and spacious, suitable for placing decorative items, electronics, or other objects. The wood has a warm, natural finish, and the overall design is minimalist with clean lines. There are no visible handles or knobs, and the compartments are open or covered by the woven panel.
description: A mid-century modern wooden sideboard with open shelves and a decorative woven panel, standing on four tapered legs. The design is minimalist, with a warm wood finish and a mix of open and concealed storage.
description_view_0: Front view showing three open compartments and a woven panel section on the right.
description_view_1: Side view showing the narrow profile and two tapered legs.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying a full-width woven panel covering the back.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, mirroring the narrow profile and two legs.
